description: A segmentation record attaching one or more tokenizations to a pub.layers.expression. Each tokenization defines a scheme (whitespace, BPE, etc.) and a sequence of indexed tokens with text spans and optional temporal spans.

expression.description: AT URI of the pub.layers.expression.expression this segmentation applies to.

tokenizations.description: One or more tokenization schemes over the expression text.

features.description: Linguistic features associated with this segmentation.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this record was created.

tokenization.description: A single tokenization scheme with its token sequence.

uuid.description: Stable UUID identifying this tokenization, for use in tokenRef anchors.

kindUri.description: AT URI of a record formally defining the tokenization kind.

kind.description: Tokenization scheme: whitespace, bpe, sentencepiece, character, etc.

tokens.description: Ordered sequence of tokens produced by this tokenization.

token.description: A single token within a tokenization.

tokenIndex.description: Zero-based index of this token in the tokenization sequence.

textSpan.description: Byte-offset span of this token in the parent expression text.

temporalSpan.description: Time range of this token within the associated media (optional).
